title: salix arbuscula var. humilis
intro: Salix arbuscula var. humilis, also known as dwarf willow, is a small, shrub-like plant that belongs to the Salicaceae family. The medicinal properties of Salix arbuscula var. humilis include its ability to reduce inflammation, and it has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to lower blood sugar levels, improve cardiovascular health, and act as an antioxidant. Salix arbuscula var. humilis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
